            const groupSeparator = options.groupSeparator;
            const decimalSeparator = options.decimalSeparator
            delete options.groupSeparator;
            delete options.decimalSeparator;
            const formatter = new Intl.NumberFormat(
                'en\u002DGB',
                Object.assign({
                    style: 'currency',
                    currency: 'GBP',
                    signDisplay: showSign ? 'always' : 'auto'
                }, options)
            );
            return (typeof Intl.NumberFormat.prototype.formatToParts === 'function') ?
                formatter.formatToParts(value).map(({type, value}) => {
                    switch (type) {
                        case 'currency':
                            return '\u00A3' || value;
                        case 'minusSign':
                            return '- ';
                        case 'plusSign':
                            return '+ ';
                        case 'group':
                            return groupSeparator !== undefined ? groupSeparator : value;
                        case 'decimal':
                            return decimalSeparator !== undefined ? decimalSeparator : value;
                        default :
                            return value;
                    }
                }).reduce((string, part) => string + part) :
                formatter.format(value);
        }

        const formatStr = function (str, nStart) {
            const args = Array.from(arguments).slice(2);

            return str.replace(/(%+)([0-9]+)/g, (m, p, n) => {
                const idx = parseInt(n) - nStart;

                if (args[idx] === null || args[idx] === void 0) {
                    return m;
                }
                return p.length % 2
                    ? p.slice(0, -1).replace('%%', '%') + args[idx]
                    : p.replace('%%', '%') + n;

         * extract an element from the DOM to replace in
         * the current page under the same selector,

            const doc = parser.parseFromString(content, 'text/html');
            const contentNode = doc.querySelector(targetSelector);

            // Bail if content or target can't be found
            if (!contentNode || !document.querySelector(targetSelector)) {
                return;
            }

                        hyva.activateScripts(contentNode);
            
            // Replace the old DOM node with the new content
            document.querySelector(targetSelector).replaceWith(contentNode);

            // Reload customerSectionData and display cookie-messages if present
            window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("reload-customer-section-data"));
            hyva.initMessages();
        }

        hyva.removeScripts = (contentNode) => {
            const scripts = contentNode.getElementsByTagName('script');
            for (let i = 0; i < scripts.length; i++) {
                scripts[i].parentNode.removeChild(scripts[i]);
            }
            const templates = contentNode.getElementsByTagName('template');
            for (let i = 0; i < templates.length; i++) {
                const container = document.createElement('div');
                container.innerHTML = templates[i].innerHTML;
                hyva.removeScripts(container);
                templates[i].innerHTML = container.innerHTML;
            }
        }

        hyva.activateScripts = (contentNode) => {
            // Create new array from HTMLCollection to avoid mutation of collection while manipulating the DOM.

        }

        hyva.getUenc = () => btoa(window.location.href).replace(/[+/=]/g, match => replace[match]);

        let currentTrap;

        const focusableElements = (rootElement) => {
            const selector = 'button, [href], input, select, textarea, details, [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"]';
            return Array.from(rootElement.querySelectorAll(selector))
                .filter(el => {
                    return el.style.display !== 'none'
                        && !el.disabled
                        && el.tabIndex !== -1
                        && (el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length)
                })
        }

        const focusTrap = (e) => {
            const isTabPressed = e.key === 'Tab' || e.keyCode === 9;
            if (!isTabPressed) return;

            const focusable = focusableElements(currentTrap)
            const firstFocusableElement = focusable[0]
            const lastFocusableElement = focusable[focusable.length - 1]

            e.shiftKey
                ? document.activeElement === firstFocusableElement && (lastFocusableElement.focus(), e.preventDefault())
                : document.activeElement === lastFocusableElement && (firstFocusableElement.focus(), e.preventDefault())

        }

        hyva.createBooleanObject = (name, value = false, additionalMethods = {}) => {

<script>
    function overlayChangeModal() {
        return {
            shortAddress: 'Select Your Delivery Address',
            modalInit() {
                document.addEventListener('closePostcodeModal', () => { this.closeModal();});
                document.addEventListener('showPostcodeModal', () => { this.openModal(); });
                this.setShortAddress();

                const notifyBar = document.getElementsByClassName('notify-bar');
                const modalRef = this.$refs.headerDelivery;

                if(notifyBar.length > 0) {
                    modalRef.classList.add('md:top-12');
                } else {
                    modalRef.classList.add('md:top-3');
                }


                window.addEventListener('flowerbx.header.recalc.spacing', () => {
                    if(
                        notifyBar.length > 0 &&
                        window.getComputedStyle(notifyBar[0]).display === 'none'
                    ) {
                        modalRef.classList.remove('md:top-12');
                        modalRef.classList.add('md:top-3');
                    }
                });
            },
            setShortAddress() {
                if (!!hyva.getCookie('delivery_location')) {
                    const addressObj = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(hyva.getCookie('location-data')));
                    let address = '';
                    if ( addressObj !== null && typeof addressObj !== 'undefined') {
                        let city = addressObj.full_address.city ? addressObj.full_address.city + ', ' : '';
                        let postcode = addressObj.full_address.post_code  ? addressObj.full_address.post_code : '';
                        address = 'Delivery to' + ' ' + city + postcode;
                    }
                    this.shortAddress = address;
                }
            },
            openModal() {
                this.show('postcodechanger');
            },
            closeModal() {
                this.hide();
            }
        }
    }
</script>

<script>
  function guestPostcodeChecker() {
    return {
      placeholder: " Enter Delivery Address",
      changeAddress: false,
      addManualAddress: false,
      justBrowse: false,
      loadFormLookup: false,
      cannotDeliver: '',
      cannotDeliverMessage: '',
      longAddress: '',
      inputClass: 'form-input w-full validate-zip-international focus:border-none focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none bg-[#F9F9F9]',
      outlineStile: 'outline-color: #f00; outline-width: 1px; outline-offset: 0px; padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; font-size: 13px;',
      selectedCountry: '',
      showModalTemplate: false,
      initPostcodeGuest() {
        this.loadFormLookup = !!hyva.getCookie('delivery_location');
        this.justBrowse = true; //!!hyva.getCookie('delivery-gate');
        this.showTemplate();
        this.eventAddManualAddress();
        if (!this.loadFormLookup && this.justBrowse) {
          this.goToLookup();
        }
        this.setLongAddress()
      },
      closeModal() {
        this.changeAddress = false;
        this.addManualAddress = false;
        document.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('closePostcodeModal'));
      },
      showManualInput() {
        this.showModalTemplate = true;
        this.changeAddress = true;
        this.addManualAddress = true;
      },
      goBack() {
        if(this.addManualAddress) {
          this.changeAddress = true;
          this.addManualAddress = false;
        } else {
          this.changeAddress = false;
        }
      },
      goToLookup() {
        this.changeAddress = true;
        this.$nextTick(() => this.$refs.poscodechangeInput.focus());
      },
      confirmDelivery() {
        window.location.reload();
      },
      showTemplate() {
        if ((this.loadFormLookup || this.justBrowse)) {
          document.addEventListener('postCodeCannotDeliver', (e) => {
            this.cannotDeliver = e.detail.cannotDeliver;
            this.cannotDeliverMessage = e.detail.message ?? '';
          });
          this.showModalTemplate = true;
        }
      },
      setLongAddress() {
        if (this.loadFormLookup) {
          const addressObj = JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(hyva.getCookie('location-data')));
          let address = '';
          if (addressObj !== null && typeof addressObj !== 'undefined') {
            address = addressObj.full_address.city ? addressObj.full_address.full_txt : '';
          }
          this.longAddress = address;
        }
      },
      escapeInput() {
        // Some action if needed
      },
      changeCountry: function(countrySelectElement) {
        this.selectedCountry = countrySelectElement.value;
      },
      submitForm: function () {
        const form = document.getElementById('postcodechange-form');
        let postalcodechangeFormSubmit = new CustomEvent("postalcodechangeFormSubmit", {
          "detail": form
        });
        document.dispatchEvent(postalcodechangeFormSubmit);
      },
      eventAddManualAddress: function () {
        document.addEventListener('postcodeAddManualAddress', (e) => {
          this.showManualInput();
        });
      },
      validateManualForm: function() {
        const form = document.getElementById('postcodechange-manual-form');

        let inputElements = Array.from(form.getElementsByTagName('input'));
        let selectElements = Array.from(form.getElementsByTagName('select'));

        let valid = true;
        inputElements.map((element) => {
          if (element.dataset.validate) {
            if( JSON.parse(element.dataset.validate).required) {
              if (element.value.trim().length === 0) {
                // element.focus();
                element.style.outlineStyle = "solid";
                valid = false;
              }else {
                element.style.outlineStyle = "none";
              }
            }
          }
        });

        selectElements.map((element) => {
          if (element.dataset.validate) {
            if( JSON.parse(element.dataset.validate).required) {
              if (element.value.trim().length === 0) {
                // element.focus();
                element.style.outlineStyle = "solid";
                valid = false;
              }else {
                element.style.outlineStyle = "none";
              }
            }
          }
        });
        return valid;
      },
      submitManualForm: function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();

        if (this.validateManualForm()) {
          const form = document.getElementById('postcodechange-manual-form');
          let postalcodechangeFormSubmit = new CustomEvent("postalcodechangeManualFormSubmit", {
            "detail": form
          });
          document.dispatchEvent(postalcodechangeFormSubmit);
        }
        // event.target.submit()

      }
    }
  }
</script>

<script>
  function overlayModalView() {
    return {
      modalInit() {
        // document.addEventListener('postcodeChangeManualAddress', () => { this.showManualAddress(); });
        if (this.validatecookies() === false) {
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.show('postcodechecker');
          }, 2000)
        }
      },
      validatecookies() {
        if (!!hyva.getCookie('delivery-gate')) {
          return true
        }
        if (!!hyva.getCookie('country_switcher')) {
          return true
        }

        if (window.CURRENT_STORE_CODE === 'ar_ae') {
            return true;
        }
        return (!!hyva.getCookie('delivery_location'));
      },
      showManualAddress() {
        this.hide();
        document.dispatchEvent( new CustomEvent("showPostcodeModal", {}));
        document.dispatchEvent( new CustomEvent("postcodeAddManualAddress", {}));
      }
    }

</script>

<script>
    function postcodeChecker() {

        function scripts() {
            return [
                {
                    'url': 'https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Fstatic\u002Fversion1770718618\u002Ffrontend\u002FFlowerbx\u002Fdefault_hyva\u002Fen_GB\u002FObjectsource_PostCodeChecker\u002Fjs\u002Flocation\u002Ddata\u002Dhyva.min.js',
                    'config': ''
                },
                {
                    'url': 'https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Fstatic\u002Fversion1770718618\u002Ffrontend\u002FFlowerbx\u002Fdefault_hyva\u002Fen_GB\u002FObjectsource_PostCodeChecker\u002Fjs\u002Fpostcodecheck\u002Dhyva.min.js',
                    'config': {
                        "fbConversionApiUrl": "https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Frest\u002FV1\u002FsendEvent",
                        "deliveryLocationUrl": "https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Frest\u002FV1\u002Fdelivery_location",
                        "updateAddressUrl": "https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Fobjectsource_delivery\u002Fpopup\u002FupdateAddress",
                        "checkCartItemsUrl": "https\u003A\u002F\u002Fwww.flowerbx.com\u002Frest\u002FV1\u002Fquote_items_checker",
                    }
                }
            ]
        }

        function loadScript(scriptData) {
            let script = document.createElement('script');
            script.src = scriptData.url;
            script.onload = () => {
                if (typeof init !== "undefined") {
                    init(scriptData.config);
                }
            }
            document.head.append(script);
            return new Promise((resolve) => script.addEventListener('load', resolve));
        }

        return {
            countrySet: false,
            selectedCountry: '',
            selectedAddress: '',
            addressSet: false,
            loadFormLookup: false,
            isInitialized: false,
            cannotDeliver: false,
            addressIsSet() {
                this.addressSet = true;
            },
            loadScripts: function () {
                if (this.isInitialized) {
                    return;
                }
                if (typeof window.postcodecheckerScripsLoaded !== 'undefined' && window.postcodecheckerScripsLoaded === true) {
                    this.postInit();
                    return;
                }
                let promises = [
                    scripts().map((scriptData) => {
                        loadScript(scriptData);
                    })
                ];
                Promise.all(promises).then((prom) => {
                    this.postInit();
                });

            },
            formInit() {
                this.loadScripts();
                document.addEventListener('postCodeCheckSuccess', () => {
                    // this.addressIsSet();
                });
                document.addEventListener('postCodeCannotDeliver', (e) => {
                   this.cannotDeliver = e.detail.cannotDeliver;
                });
                this.countrySet = !!hyva.getCookie('country_switcher');
                this.loadFormLookup = !hyva.getCookie('delivery_location');

                if (typeof pca !== 'undefined') {
                    pca.on("load", function (type, id, control) {
                        var isChrome = !!window.chrome || !!window.chrome.webstore;
                        if (isChrome == true) {
                            for (i = 0; control.fields.length > i; i++) {
                                pca.getElement(control.fields[i].element).autocomplete = "off";
                            }
                        }
                    });
                } else {
                    // console.log('pca not defined')
                }
            },
            postInit: function () {
                window.postcodecheckerScripsLoaded = true;
                this.isInitialized = true;
            },
            submitPostcodeForm: function () {
                const form = document.getElementById('postcode-form');
                let postalcodeFormSubmit = new CustomEvent("postalcodeFormSubmit", {
                    "detail": form
                });
                document.dispatchEvent(postalcodeFormSubmit);
            },
            escapeInput() {
                this.closeModal();
            },
            setCountry() {
                let url = (this.selectedCountry !== '') ? this.selectedCountry : BASE_URL;
                let currentUrl = window.location.href;
                let urlArr = currentUrl.split(window.location.origin + '/');

                if(urlArr[1]) {
                    let store = urlArr[1].slice(0, 3);
                    switch (store) {
                        case 'us/':
                        // case 'eu/':
                            url = url + urlArr[1].slice(3);
                            break;
                        default:
                           url = url + urlArr[1];
                    }
                }
                hyva.setCookie('country_switcher', '1', 30);
                window.location.href = url;
            },
            setBrowseCookie() {
                hyva.setCookie('delivery-gate', '1');
            },
            closeModal: function () {
                this.setBrowseCookie();
                window.location.reload();
            },
            showManualInput: function() {
              hyva.setCookie('delivery-gate', '2');
              document.dispatchEvent( new CustomEvent("postcodeChangeManualAddress", {}));
            }
        }
    }
</script>

<script>
    function storeSwitcherHeader() {
        return {
            showTemplate: true,
            showList: false,
            currentCountryCode: "GB",
            defaultEuCountry: "GB",
            currentWebsite: "uk",
            websiteStore: "",
            isMobile: false,
            mobileClass: '',
            ddCarret: 'rotate-90',
            initialise() {
                let isCountryCorrect = false;
                const dataLocation = hyva.getCookie('delivery_location');
                let locations = [
                    {'uk': ['NAT_GB', 'LON_GB']},
                    // {'eu': ['NAT_FR', 'NAT_BE', 'NAT_IE', 'NAT_DE', 'NAT_EU', 'PAR_FR']},
                    {'eu': ['NAT_GB', 'LON_GB']},
                    {'us': ['MTN_US', 'ECT_US', 'LAX_US', 'WCT_US', 'USA']}
                ];
                this.$nextTick(() => {
                    if (!!dataLocation) {
                        locations.map((web) => {
                            const locWebsite = Object.keys(web)[0];
                            if (locWebsite === this.currentWebsite) {
                                Object.values(web)[0].map((loc) => {
                                    if (loc === dataLocation) {
                                        isCountryCorrect = true;
                                    }
                                })
                            }
                        })
                    }

                    if (!!dataLocation && !isCountryCorrect) {
                        this.resetData(this.currentCountryCode);
                        window.location.reload();
                    }
                    this.checkIsMobile();
                });

                document.addEventListener('postcodeCheckUiComponentLoaded', () => {
                    let country = this.currentCountryCode;
                    if (this.currentCountryCode === 'EU') {
                        country = window.locationData().getCountryId() ? window.locationData().getCountryId() : '';
                    }
                    this.websiteStore = country; //this.buildWebsiteList()[country];
                });

                const notifyBar = document.getElementsByClassName('notify-bar');
                const switcherRef = this.$refs.storeSwitcherHeaderRef;

                if(notifyBar.length > 0) {
                    switcherRef.classList.add('md:top-[70px]');
                } else {
                    switcherRef.classList.add('md:top-[34px]');
                }

                window.addEventListener('flowerbx.header.recalc.spacing', () => {
                    if(
                        notifyBar.length > 0 &&
                        window.getComputedStyle(notifyBar[0]).display === 'none'
                    ) {
                        switcherRef.classList.add('md:top-[34px]');
                    }
                });

            },
            checkIsMobile: function () {
                this.isMobile = window.matchMedia('(max-width: 767px)').matches && this.isTouchEnabled()
                if(this.isMobile) {
                    this.mobileClass = 'absolute bottom-[200px] w-full z-[45]';
                    document.getElementById("menu_modal_level0").prepend(document.getElementById("store_switcher_header"));
                } else {
                    this.mobileClass = '';
                }
            },
            isTouchEnabled: function () {
                return ('ontouchstart' in window) ||
                    (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0) ||
                    (navigator.msMaxTouchPoints > 0);
            },
            selectCountry(event) {
                const newCountryCode = event.target.dataset.countryCode;
                // const flagImg = event.target.dataset.countryFlag;
                const currencySymbol = event.target.dataset.countryCurrencySymbol;
                const websiteCode = event.target.dataset.websiteCode;
                this.resetData(newCountryCode);
                window.location.href = event.target.getAttribute('href');
            },
            resetData(countryCode) {
                window.locationData().resetAllData();
                window.locationData().setCountryId(countryCode);
                hyva.setCookie('region_id', '', -1);
                hyva.setCookie('delivery_location', '', -1);
                hyva.setCookie('delivery-gate', '', -1);
            },
            buildWebsiteList() {
                return {
                                        "GB":"United Kingdom",
                                        "US":"UNITED STATES",
                                        "AE":"United Arab Emirates - Bespoke Studio",
                                    }
            },
            showCountryList() {
                let wd = !this.showList;
                if (wd) {
                    document.getElementById("store_switcher_header").style.setProperty('height', 'calc(94% - 170px)');
                    this.ddCarret = '-rotate-90';
                } else {
                    document.getElementById("store_switcher_header").style.height = 'auto';
                    this.ddCarret = 'rotate-90';
                }
                this.showList = wd;
            }
        }
    }
</script>

<script>
    function initHeader() {
        return {
            menuOpen: false,
            searchOpen: false,
            cart: {},
            initialise() {
                const $headerEmpty = this.$refs.headerEmpty,
                    $stickyHeaderRef = this.$refs.stickyHeaderRef;

                const currentStyle = $headerEmpty.getAttribute('style');

                 function calcHeight() {
                    let heightCalculation =  parseInt(window.getComputedStyle($stickyHeaderRef).getPropertyValue('margin-top')) + $stickyHeaderRef.offsetHeight;
                    $headerEmpty.setAttribute('style',  `${currentStyle !== null ? currentStyle: ''} height:${ heightCalculation }px`);
                }

                calcHeight();

                const lazyLayout = this.debounce(() => {
                    calcHeight();
                }, 600);

                window.addEventListener('flowerbx.header.recalc.spacing', calcHeight);
                window.addEventListener("resize", lazyLayout);
            },

            debounce(func, wait, immediate) {
                function restArguments(func, startIndex) {
                    startIndex = startIndex == null ? func.length - 1 : +startIndex;
                    return function() {
                        var length = Math.max(arguments.length - startIndex, 0),
                            rest = Array(length),
                            index = 0;
                        for (; index < length; index++) {
                            rest[index] = arguments[index + startIndex];
                        }
                        switch (startIndex) {
                            case 0: return func.call(this, rest);
                            case 1: return func.call(this, arguments[0], rest);
                            case 2: return func.call(this, arguments[0], arguments[1], rest);
                        }
                        var args = Array(startIndex + 1);
                        for (index = 0; index < startIndex; index++) {
                            args[index] = arguments[index];
                        }
                        args[startIndex] = rest;
                        return func.apply(this, args);
                    };
                };
                var now = Date.now || function() {
                    return new Date().getTime();
                };
                //underscore
                var timeout, previous, args, result, context;

                var later = function () {
                    var passed = now() - previous;
                    if (wait > passed) {
                        timeout = setTimeout(later, wait - passed);
                    } else {
                        timeout = null;
                        if (!immediate) result = func.apply(context, args);
                        // This check is needed because `func` can recursively invoke `debounced`.
                        if (!timeout) args = context = null;
                    }
                };

                var debounced = restArguments(function (_args) {
                    context = this;
                    args = _args;
                    previous = now();
                    if (!timeout) {
                        timeout = setTimeout(later, wait);
                        if (immediate) result = func.apply(context, args);
                    }
                    return result;
                });

                debounced.cancel = function () {
                    clearTimeout(timeout);
                    timeout = args = context = null;
                };

                return debounced;
            },
            getData(data) {
                if (data.cart) {
                    this.cart = data.cart
                }
            },
            toggleMenu() {
                console.log('Toggle the menu');
                this.menuOpen = !this.menuOpen;
                osMegaMenu.toggleMenu(this.menuOpen);
            },
        }
    }

    function initCompareHeader() {
        return {
            compareProducts: null,
            itemCount: 0,
            receiveCompareData(data) {
                if (data['compare-products']) {
                    this.compareProducts = data['compare-products'];
                    this.itemCount = this.compareProducts.count;
                }
            }
        }
    }
</script>

<script>
    function initNavigation() {
        return {
            currentMenu: false,
            mouseover: function(e) {
                let el = e.target.closest('.menu-item');
                if (this.currentMenu) {
                    this.currentMenu.classList.remove('open');
                }
                el.classList.add('open');
                this.currentMenu = el;
                let menu = el.getAttribute('data-action');
                osMegaMenu.openMenu(menu);
            },
            mouseleave: function(e) {
                if (this.currentMenu) {
                    this.currentMenu.classList.remove('open');
                }
                osMegaMenu.closeMenus();
            },
            menuClick: function(e) {
                let el = e.target.closest('.menu-item');
                let menu = el.getAttribute('data-action');
                osMegaMenu.openMenu(menu);
            },
            openMenu: function(menu) {
                osMegaMenu.openMenu(menu);
            },
            closeMenus: function() {
                let els = document.getElementsByClassName('menu');
                for (var i = 0; i < els.length; i++) {
                    els[i].classList.remove('open')
                }
            },
            submenuClick: function(e) {
                let el = e.target.closest('.submenu-item');
                if (el) {
                    let menu = el.getAttribute('data-action');
                    osMegaMenu.openMenu(menu);
                }
            },
            submenuClose: function(e) {
                let menu = e.target.closest('.menu');
                osMegaMenu.closeMenu(menu);
            }
        }
    }

</script>

<script>
    (function(){
        osMegaMenu = {
            config: [],
            currentMenu: false,
            init: function(data) {
                this.config = JSON.parse(data);
            },
            toggleMenu: function(state) {
                if (state) {
                    let els = document.getElementsByClassName('menu');
                    if (els.length) {
                        let e = els[0];
                        let i = e.getElementsByClassName('menu-inner-content');
                        let h = i[0].clientHeight;
                        e.style.height = h + 'px';
                        this.openMenu(e);
                    }
                } else {
                    this.closeMenus();
                }
            },
            openMenu: function(menu) {
                try {
                    menu = this.findMenu(menu);
                    let isMobile = window.matchMedia("only screen and (max-width: 760px)").matches;
                    let level = menu.getAttribute('data-level');
                    let subMenuLevel = isMobile ? 1 : 2;
                    let isSubMenu = (level >= subMenuLevel) ? true : false;
                    if (isSubMenu) {
                        menu.classList.add('slide-left');
                    } else {
                        if (this.currentMenu && this.currentMenu !== menu) {
                            this.closeMenu(this.currentMenu);
                        }
                        this.currentMenu = menu;
                        menu.classList.add('slide-down');
                    }
                    menu.classList.add('open');

                    let h = '90vh';
                    if (!isMobile) {
                        let i = menu.getElementsByClassName('menu-inner-content');
                        h = i[0].clientHeight + 'px';
                    }
                    menu.style.height = h;

                } catch (err) {
                    // console.log(err);
                }
            },
            closeMenu: function(menu) {
                menu = this.findMenu(menu);
                if (menu) {
                    menu.classList.remove('open');
                }
            },
            closeMenus: function() {
                let els = document.getElementsByClassName('menu');
                for (var i = 0; i < els.length; i++) {
                    els[i].classList.remove('open');
                    if (!els[i].classList.contains('sub-menu')) {
                        els[i].style.height = 0;
                    }
                }
            },
            findMenu: function(menu) {
                if (typeof(menu) === 'string') {
                    let els = document.getElementsByClassName('menu-'+menu);
                    if (els.length) {
                        return els[0];
                    } else {
                        return false;
                    }
                }
                return menu;

            },
            openSubMenu: function(menu) {
                menu = this.findMenu(menu);
                menu.classList.add('slide-left');
                menu.classList.add('open');
            }
        };
        window.dispatchEvent(new Event('onload-osMegaMenu'));
    })();
</script>

        <div class="header-search  z-10 w-full border-t shadow-sm bg-container-lighter border-container-lighter"
             id="search-content"
             :class="{ 'block': searchOpen}" x-cloak x-show="searchOpen"
             @click.outside="searchOpen = false"
        >
            <script>
    'use strict';

    function initMiniSearch() {
        return {
            minSearchLength: 1,
                        suggestions: [],
            suggest() {
                const search = this.$refs.searchInput;
                if (search.value.length >= this.minSearchLength) {
                    search.setCustomValidity('');
                    search.reportValidity();
                    this.fetchSuggestions(search.value);
                } else {
                    this.suggestions = [];
                }
            },
            fetchSuggestions(term) {
                fetch(
                    window.BASE_URL + 'search/ajax/suggest?' + new URLSearchParams({q: term}),
                    {
                        headers: {
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        }
                    }
                )
                    .then(response => response.json())
                    .then(result => this.suggestions = result);
            },
                        search(term) {
                const search = this.$refs.searchInput;
                term = term || search.value;
                if (term.length < this.minSearchLength) {
                    search.setCustomValidity('Minimum\u0020Search\u0020query\u0020length\u0020is\u00201');
                    search.reportValidity();
                } else {
                    search.setCustomValidity('');
                    search.value = term;
                    this.$refs.form.submit();
                }
            },
            focusElement(element) {
                if (element && element.nodeName === "DIV") {
                    element.focus();
                    return true;
                } else {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
    }
</script>
<div class="container py-2 mx-auto text-black" x-data="initMiniSearch()">

    <!--Cart Drawer-->
    <script>
    function initCartDrawer() {
        return {
            open: false,
            isLoading: false,
            cart: {},
            maxItemsToDisplay: 10,
            itemsCount: 0,
            getData(data) {
                if (data.cart) {
                    this.cart = data.cart;
                    this.itemsCount = data.cart.items && data.cart.items.length || 0;
                    this.setCartItems();
                }
                this.isLoading = false;
            },
            cartItems: [],
            getItemCountTitle() {
                return hyva.strf('\u00250\u0020of\u0020\u00251\u0020products\u0020in\u0020cart\u0020displayed', this.maxItemsToDisplay, this.itemsCount)
            },
            setCartItems() {
                this.cartItems = this.cart.items && this.cart.items.sort((a, b) => b.item_id - a.item_id) || [];

                if (this.maxItemsToDisplay > 0) {
                    this.cartItems = this.cartItems.slice(0, parseInt(this.maxItemsToDisplay, 10));
                }
            },
            deleteItemFromCart(itemId) {
                this.isLoading = true;

                const itemData = this.cart.items.filter((item) => item['item_id'] === itemId);
                const formKey = hyva.getFormKey();
                const postUrl = BASE_URL + 'checkout/sidebar/removeItem/';

                fetch(postUrl, {
                    "headers": {
                        "content-type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8",
                    },
                    "body": "form_key=" + formKey + "&item_id=" + itemId,
                    "method": "POST",
                    "mode": "cors",
                    "credentials": "include"
                }).then(response => {
                    if (response.redirected) {
                        window.location.href = response.url;
                    } else if (response.ok) {
                        return response.json();
                    } else {
                        window.dispatchMessages && window.dispatchMessages([{
                            type: 'warning',
                            text: 'Could\u0020not\u0020remove\u0020item\u0020from\u0020quote.'
                        }]);
                        this.isLoading = false;
                    }
                }).then(result => {
                    window.dispatchMessages && window.dispatchMessages([{
                        type: result.success ? 'success' : 'error',
                        text: result.success
                            ? 'You\u0020removed\u0020the\u0020item.'
                            : result.error_message
                    }], result.success ? 5000 : 0);

                    if (result.success && itemData) {
                        window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('cart-item-removed', { detail: itemData }));
                    }

                    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('reload-customer-section-data'));
                });
            },
            scrollLock(use = true) {
                document.body.style.overflow = use ? "hidden" : "";
            },
            toggleCartDrawer(event) {
                if (event.detail && event.detail.isOpen !== undefined) {
                    if (event.detail.isOpen) {
                        this.openCartDrawer();
                    } else {
                        this.open = false;
                        this.scrollLock(false);
                        this.$refs && this.$refs.cartDialogContent && hyva.releaseFocus(this.$refs.cartDialogContent);
                    }
                } else {
                                        this.openCartDrawer()
                }
            },
            openCartDrawer() {
                this.open = true;
                this.scrollLock(true);
                this.$nextTick(() => {
                    this.$refs && this.$refs.cartDialogContent && hyva.trapFocus(this.$refs.cartDialogContent)
                })
            },
            closeCartDrawer() {
                this.$dispatch('toggle-cart', { isOpen: false })
            },
            getSectionDataExtraActions() {
                if (!this.cart.extra_actions) {
                    return '';
                }

                const contentNode = document.createElement('div');
                contentNode.innerHTML = this.cart.extra_actions;

                hyva.activateScripts(contentNode);

                return contentNode.innerHTML;
            }
        }
    }
</script>
<section x-cloak
         x-show="cart"
         id="cart-drawer"
         x-data="initCartDrawer()"
         @private-content-loaded.window="getData($event.detail.data)"
         @toggle-cart.window="toggleCartDrawer($event)"
         @keydown.escape="closeCartDrawer"
>
    <div role="dialog"
         aria-labelledby="cart-drawer-title"
         aria-modal="true"
         :aria-hidden="!open"
         class="fixed inset-y-0 right-0 z-30 flex max-w-full">
        <div class="backdrop"
             x-show="open"
             x-transition:enter="ease-in-out duration-500"
             x-transition:enter-start="opacity-0"
             x-transition:enter-end="opacity-100"
             x-transition:leave="ease-in-out duration-500"
             x-transition:leave-start="opacity-100"
             x-transition:leave-end="opacity-0"
             role="button"
             @click="closeCartDrawer"
             aria-label="Close minicart"></div>
        <div class="relative w-screen max-w-md shadow-2xl pt-6 md:pt-0"
             x-show="open"
             x-transition:enter="transform transition ease-in-out duration-500 sm:duration-700"
             x-transition:enter-start="translate-x-full"
             x-transition:enter-end="translate-x-0"
             x-transition:leave="transform transition ease-in-out duration-500 sm:duration-700"
             x-transition:leave-start="translate-x-0"
             x-transition:leave-end="translate-x-full"
             x-ref="cartDialogContent"
             role="region"
             :tabindex="open ? 0 : -1"
             aria-label="My Cart"

        >
            <div class="flex flex-col h-full max-h-screen bg-white text-black shadow-xl space-y-6 ">
                
                <header class="relative px-4 pt-6 sm:px-6">
                    <p id="cart-drawer-title" class="text-lg font-medium leading-7 text-gray-900">
                        <strong class="font-medium">My Cart</strong>
                        <span class="items-total text-xs"
                              x-show="maxItemsToDisplay && maxItemsToDisplay < itemsCount"
                              x-text="getItemCountTitle()">
                        </span>
                    </p>
                </header>

                
                <template x-if="!itemsCount">
                    <div class="relative grid gap-6 px-4 py-6 overflow-y-auto bg-white border-b
                        sm:gap-8 sm:px-6 border-container"></div>
                </template>
                <template x-if="!itemsCount">
                    <div class="relative px-4 py-6 bg-white border-bs sm:px-6 border-container">
                        No items in cart                    </div>
                </template>

                <template x-if="itemsCount">
                    <div class="relative grid gap-2 px-1 py-3 sm:px-3 bg-white border-b border-container overflow-y-auto overscroll-y-contain">
                        <template x-for="item in cartItems">

    <!--Authentication Pop-Up-->
    <script>
    function initAuthentication() {
        return {
            open: false,
            close() {
                this.open = false;
            },
            forceAuthentication: false,
            checkoutUrl: 'https://www.flowerbx.com/checkout/index/',
            errors: 0,
            hasCaptchaToken: 0,
            displayErrorMessage: false,
            errorMessages: [],
            setErrorMessages(message) {
                this.errorMessages = [message];
                this.displayErrorMessage = true;
            },
            submitForm() {
                // Do not rename $form, the variable is expected to be declared in the recaptcha output
                const $form = document.querySelector('#login-form');
                
                if (this.errors === 0) {
                    this.dispatchLoginRequest($form);
                }
            },
            onPrivateContentLoaded() {
                const data = this.$event.detail.data;
                const isLoggedIn = data.customer && data.customer.firstname;
                if (data.cart && !isLoggedIn) {
                    this.forceAuthentication = !data.cart.isGuestCheckoutAllowed;
                }
            },
            redirectIfAuthenticated() {
                const event = this.$event;
                this.open = this.forceAuthentication;

                if (event.detail && event.detail.url) {
                    this.checkoutUrl = event.detail.url;
                }
                if (!this.forceAuthentication) {
                    window.location.href = this.checkoutUrl;
                }
            },
            resetErrors() {
                this.errors = 0;
            },
            dispatchLoginRequest(form) {
                this.isLoading = true;
                const username = this.$refs['customer-email'].value;
                const password = this.$refs['customer-password'].value;
                const formKey = hyva.getFormKey();
                const bodyFields = {
                    'username': username,
                    'password': password,
                    'formKey': formKey
                };
                                const fieldName = 'g\u002Drecaptcha\u002Dresponse';
                const recaptchaField = fieldName && form[fieldName];
                if (recaptchaField) {
                    bodyFields[fieldName] = recaptchaField.value;
                }
                fetch('https://www.flowerbx.com/customer/ajax/login/', {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: {
                            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify(bodyFields)
                    }
                ).then(response => {
                        return response.json()
                    }
                ).then(data => {
                    this.isLoading = false;
                    if (data.errors) {
                        this.setErrorMessages(data.message);
                        this.errors = 1;
                        this.hasCaptchaToken = 0;
                    } else {
                        window.location.href = this.checkoutUrl;
                    }
                });
            }
        }
    }

    window.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => Alpine.data('initAuthentication', initAuthentication), {once: true})
</script>
<section id="authentication-popup"
         x-data="initAuthentication"
         @private-content-loaded.window="onPrivateContentLoaded"
         @toggle-authentication.window="redirectIfAuthenticated"
         @keydown.window.escape="close"
>

        class="backdrop"
        aria-hidden="true"
        x-cloak
        x-show="open"

        x-transition:leave="ease-in-out duration-500"

                        <form class="form form-login"

<div class="page messages"><script>
        function initMessages() {
        "use strict";
        return {
            messages: window.mageMessages || [],
            isEmpty() {
                return this.messages.reduce(
                    function (isEmpty, message) {
                        return isEmpty && message === undefined
                    }, true
                )
            },
            hasMessages() {
                return !this.isEmpty();
            },
            hasMessage() {
                return !!this.message;
            },
            removeMessage() {
                this.messages[this.index] = undefined;
            },
            addMessages(messages, hideAfter) {
                messages.map((message) => {
                    this.messages = this.messages.concat(message);
                    if (hideAfter === undefined && message.type === 'success' && window.defaultSuccessMessageTimeout) {
                        hideAfter = window.defaultSuccessMessageTimeout;
                    }
                    if (hideAfter) {
                        this.setHideTimeOut(this.messages.length -1, hideAfter);
                    }
                });
            },
            setHideTimeOut(messageIndex, hideAfter) {
                setTimeout((messageIndex) => {
                    this.messages[messageIndex] = undefined;
                }, hideAfter, messageIndex);
            },
            eventListeners: {
                ['@messages-loaded.window'](event) {
                    this.addMessages(event.detail.messages, event.detail.hideAfter)
                },
                ['@private-content-loaded.window'](event) {
                    const data = event.detail.data;
                    if (
                        data.messages &&
                        data.messages.messages &&
                        data.messages.messages.length
                    ) {
                        this.addMessages(data.messages.messages);
                    }
                },
                ['@clear-messages.window']() {
                    this.messages = [];
                }
            },
            getMessageUiId() {
                return 'message-' + this.message.type;
            }
        }
    }

    window.addEventListener('alpine:init', () => Alpine.data('initMessages', initMessages), {once: true})
</script>
<section id="messages"
         x-data="initMessages"
         x-bind="eventListeners"
         role="alert"
>
    <template x-if="hasMessages">
        <div class="w-full">
            <div class="messages container mx-auto py-3">
                <template x-for="(message, index) in messages" :key="index">
                    <div>
                        <template x-if="hasMessage">
                            <div class="message"
                                 :class="message.type"
                                 :ui-id="getMessageUiId"
                            >
                                <span x-html="message.text"></span>
                                <button
                                    type="button"
                                    class="text-gray-600 hover:text-black"
                                    aria-label="Close message"

  <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"/>
</svg>
                                </button>

            </div>
        </div>
    </template>
</section>

<script>

    const VimeoVideoPlayer = function(config) {
        const self = this;

        let rootElement = config.rootElement;
        let splideEvent = config.splideEvent;

        videoFrame = null;
        videoPlayer = null;
        videoUrl = null;
        mobileVideoUrl = null;
        desktopVideoUrl = null;

        let getVideoUrl = function() {
            let isMobile = window.matchMedia("only screen and (max-width: 760px)").matches;
            self.videoDesktopUrl = self.videoDesktopUrl ?? self.videoUrl;
            self.videoMobileUrl = self.videoMobileUrl ?? self.videoUrl;
            let baseUrl = isMobile ? self.videoMobileUrl : self.videoDesktopUrl;
            let videoId = baseUrl.match(/[0-9]+/);
            let videoParams = "?autoplay=1&background=1&loop=1&muted=1&playsinline=1&transparent=1&texttrack=false";
            let videoUrl = 'https://player.vimeo.com/video/' + videoId + videoParams
            return videoUrl;
        };

        self.intialise = function() {
            self.elPlayer = rootElement.getElementsByClassName('video-player')[0];
            let elWrapper = self.elPlayer.closest('.video-wrapper');
            this.videoUrl = self.elPlayer.getAttribute('data-video') ?? elWrapper.getAttribute('data-video');
            this.videoMobileUrl = self.elPlayer.getAttribute('data-videoMobile') ?? elWrapper.getAttribute('data-videoMobile');
            this.videoDesktopUrl = self.elPlayer.getAttribute('data-videoDesktop') ?? elWrapper.getAttribute('data-videoDesktop');
            window.addEventListener('video-player-loaded', (event) => {
                self.initialiseVideoPlayer();
            });
            window.addEventListener(splideEvent, (event) => {
                self.onSlide();
            });
            if (window.videoPlayerLoaded) {
                self.initialiseVideoPlayer();
            } else {
                this.loadPlayerJs();
            }
        };

        self.loadPlayerJs = function() {
            const script = document.createElement('script')
            script.src = 'https://player.vimeo.com/api/player.js';
            script.onload = () => {
                window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('video-player-loaded'));
                window.videoPlayerLoaded = true;
            };
            document.head.append(script);
        }

        self.initialiseVideoPlayer = function() {
            var options = {
                background: true,
                autoplay: true,
                url: getVideoUrl()
            };
            this.videoPlayer = new Vimeo.Player(self.elPlayer, options)
            this.videoPlayer.on('play', () => {
                elHolding = rootElement.getElementsByClassName('video-holdingimage')[0];
                elHolding.classList.add('fadeaway');
            });
        }

        self.onSlide = function () {
            let li = rootElement.closest('li');
            let isActive = li.classList.contains('is-active');
            isActive ? this.play() : this.pause();
        }

        self.play = function() {
            this.videoPlayer.play();
        };

        self.pause = function() {
            this.videoPlayer.pause();
        };

        return self;
    }

</script>

    function productSliderComponentproductslider1() {

                const productSlider = new Splide( '.splide-product-slider-productslider1',{
                    type: 'loop',
                    rewind: false,
                    perPage: 5,
                    gap: 10,
                    pagination: false,
                    padding: { right: '150px' },
                    breakpoints: {
                        2400: { perPage: 3 },
                        1900: { perPage: 3 },
                        1535: { perPage: 3 },
                        1279: { perPage: 3 },
                        1023: { perPage: 2 },
                        767:  { perPage: 2, padding: { right: '15%'}, arrows: false},
                        640 : { perPage: 1, padding: { right: '30%'}},

                    }});
                productSlider.mount();
                this.counter++
            },
            eventListeners: {
                ['@splide-loaded.window'](event) {
                    if (this.counter === 0) {
                        this.initSliderComponent();
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
</script>
